{{Quote|The last member of our group is Engret, who is scarcely more than a boy, but has a good heart and a kindly temperament. His sister was an outspoken legal scholar, and she too dropped from sight.|Rekkon|<ref name="starsend" />}}
'''Engret''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] native of the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] who was a member of [[Rekkon]]'s group searching for missing loved ones. Still a young man in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], Engret joined up with Rekkon after his [[Engret's sister|sister]], a legal scholar who was vocal in her disagreements with the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], vanished. Their investigation into the Corporate Sector's rash of disappearances led them to the [[Authority Data Center]] on [[Orron III]], which Engret, Rekkon and three comrades spent over a month slowly infiltrating. However, on the day the team was supposed to finish their mission and leave the planet, Engret too disappeared: one of his fellows, [[Atuarre]], stopped by his billet and found it empty, and intuited that it was under Authority surveillance.<ref name="starsend" />

==Behind the scenes==
Engret was first mentioned in ''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'', written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1978]]. As Engret is found to have disappeared immediately after being introduced, he does not directly appear in the novel.<ref name="starsend" />
